title: Golden Globes 2026 Full Winners List - Yahoo Entertainment
text: The 2026 Golden Globes full winners list shows Hamnet claiming the top drama prize with Jessie Buckley earning best female actor honors. The biggest upset came when Wagner Moura won best male actor in a drama for his role in the Brazilian film The Secret Agent. One Battle After Another dominated the musical/comedy category with director Paul Thomas Anderson winning for both directing and screenplay, while Timothée Chalamet won best male actor in the category. Best Animated Picture went to KPop Demon Hunters. Best Non-English Language Film went to The Secret Agent. The Pitt won Best Drama Series with Noah Wyle taking best male actor. The Studio claimed Best Comedy Series with Seth Rogen winning best male actor. Adolescence swept all four nominated categories.
